roles.content: Critical thinking: A comprehensive examination of critical thinking within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on critical thinking: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to critical thinking.
Recent developments in critical thinking: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of critical thinking in contemporary philosophy.
